sentences.target: Ich kann dir später darüber berichten.

translations.de: Ich kann dir später darüber berichten.
translations.en: I can tell you about it later.
translations.ru: Я расскажу тебе об этом позже.
translations.pt: Eu te falo sobre isso mais tarde.
translations.he: אני אספר לך על זה אחר כך.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ nói với bạn sau.
translations.nl: Ik vertel je er later over.
translations.uk: Я розповім тобі про це пізніше.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें इसके बारे में बाद में बताऊँगा.
translations.el: Θα σου μιλήσω γι’ αυτό αργότερα.
translations.nb: Jeg forteller deg om det senere.
translations.id: Aku akan cerita soal itu nanti.
translations.ro: Îți spun despre asta mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg fortæller dig om det senere.
translations.ja: そのことは後で話すね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 1st person singular present indicative; selects the infinitive 'berichten' and expresses ability.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of 'berichten'.
Temporal adverb indicating time; modifies the verbal phrase.
Pronominal adverb (da- + über) meaning 'about it/that'; prepositional complement to 'berichten'.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal 'kann'. Takes a dative recipient ('dir') and a prepositional object ('darüber').

sentences.target: Die Nachrichten werden über den Sturm berichten.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaːxʁɪçtən ˈveːɐ̯dən ˈyːbɐ deːn ʃtʊʁm bəˈʁɪçtən./

translations.de: Die Nachrichten werden über den Sturm berichten.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaːxʁɪçtən ˈveːɐ̯dən ˈyːbɐ deːn ʃtʊʁm bəˈʁɪçtən./
translations.en: The news will report on the storm.
translations.es: El noticiero informará sobre la tormenta.
translations.fr: Le journal télévisé parlera de la tempête.
translations.pt: O noticiário vai falar sobre a tempestade.
translations.vi: Bản tin sẽ đưa tin về cơn bão.
translations.nl: Het nieuws zal over de storm berichten.
translations.hi: खबरें तूफ़ान के बारे में बताएँगी.
translations.pl: W wiadomościach będą mówić o burzy.
translations.el: Οι ειδήσεις θα μιλήσουν για την καταιγίδα.
translations.sv: Nyheterna kommer att rapportera om stormen.
translations.ja: ニュースが嵐について報道します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determines 'Nachrichten' as the subject.
Plural noun; nominative subject of the clause.
Auxiliary, 3rd person plural present; forms Futur I with infinitive 'berichten'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the prepositional object 'den Sturm'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; agrees with 'Sturm' as object of 'über'.
Masculine noun; accusative complement of the preposition 'über'.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the auxiliary 'werden' to express future reporting.

sentences.target: Er muss dem Chef alles berichten.

translations.de: Er muss dem Chef alles berichten.
translations.en: He has to report everything to the boss.
translations.es: Tiene que informarle todo al jefe.
translations.fr: Il doit tout dire au patron.
translations.ko: 그는 상사에게 모든 걸 보고해야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 他必须向老板汇报一切。
translations.yue: 佢要向老闆報告晒所有嘢。
translations.ru: Он должен обо всём доложить начальнику.
translations.pt: Ele precisa informar tudo ao chefe.
translations.he: הוא חייב לדווח על הכול למנהל.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phải báo cáo mọi thứ với sếp.
translations.ar: عليه أن يبلغ المدير بكل شيء.
translations.nl: Hij moet de baas alles melden.
translations.uk: Він повинен доповісти начальнику про все.
translations.hi: उसे बॉस को सब कुछ बताना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αναφέρει τα πάντα στον διευθυντή.
translations.nb: Han må rapportere alt til sjefen.
translations.id: Dia harus melaporkan semuanya kepada bos.
translations.sv: Han måste rapportera allt till chefen.
translations.da: Han skal rapportere alt til chefen.
translations.ja: 彼は上司にすべて報告しないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'berichten'.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determines 'Chef' as indirect object.
Masculine noun; dative singular as recipient/indirect object of 'berichten'.
Indefinite pronoun; accusative direct object meaning 'everything' (theme of 'berichten').
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal 'muss'. Takes a dative recipient ('dem Chef') and an accusative theme ('alles').

sentences.target: In der Schule will sie vom Ausflug berichten.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə vɪl ziː fɔm ˈaʊ̯sfluːk bəˈʁɪçtən./

translations.de: In der Schule will sie vom Ausflug berichten.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə vɪl ziː fɔm ˈaʊ̯sfluːk bəˈʁɪçtən./
translations.en: At school she wants to talk about the trip.
translations.es: En la escuela quiere hablar del viaje.
translations.fr: À l’école, elle veut parler de la sortie.
translations.it: A scuola vuole parlare della gita.
translations.ko: 학교에서 여행에 대해 이야기하고 싶어 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 在学校她想讲讲这次郊游。
translations.yue: 喺學校佢想講下今次旅行。
translations.ru: В школе она хочет рассказать о поездке.
translations.pt: Na escola, ela quer falar sobre a excursão.
translations.he: בבית הספר היא רוצה לספר על הטיול.
translations.vi: Ở trường, cô ấy muốn kể về chuyến đi.
translations.ar: في المدرسة تريد أن تتحدث عن الرحلة.
translations.nl: Op school wil ze over het uitstapje vertellen.
translations.uk: У школі вона хоче розповісти про поїздку.
translations.hu: Az iskolában a kirándulásról akar beszélni.
translations.hi: स्कूल में वह यात्रा के बारे में बात करना चाहती है.
translations.pl: W szkole chce opowiedzieć o wycieczce.
translations.el: Στο σχολείο θέλει να μιλήσει για την εκδρομή.
translations.nb: På skolen vil hun fortelle om turen.
translations.id: Di sekolah, dia ingin bercerita tentang perjalanan.
translations.sv: I skolan vill hon berätta om utflykten.
translations.ro: La școală vrea să povestească despre excursie.
translations.cs: Ve škole chce vyprávět o výletu.
translations.da: I skolen vil hun fortælle om turen.
translations.ja: 学校で彼女はその旅行について話したい。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with dative indicates location; introduces the locative PP 'in der Schule'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Schule' as object of 'in'.
Feminine noun; dative singular; object of the preposition 'in' marking location.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; expresses intention and selects the infinitive 'berichten'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the clause.
Preposition (contraction of 'von dem'); governs dative; introduces source PP 'vom Ausflug'.
Masculine noun; dative singular as object of 'vom' indicating the source/topic.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal 'will'. Takes a prepositional object 'vom Ausflug'.

Er muss dem Chef alles berichten.
In der Schule will sie vom Ausflug berichten.

/ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə vɪl ziː fɔm ˈaʊ̯sfluːk bəˈʁɪçtən./

es: El noticiero informará sobre la tormenta.
Tiene que informarle todo al jefe.
En la escuela quiere hablar del viaje.

Il doit tout dire au patron.
À l’école, elle veut parler de la sortie.
